zh.Sheffield, West Riding, Yorkshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭越可爾雪菲爾
zh.Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath於1256年6月11日出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親John de Verdun31歲，母親Isabel FitzAdam28歲。他於大約1272年與Eleanor de Furnival在英國英格蘭越可爾雪菲爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1295年4月23日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年38歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾阿頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath于1256年6月11日出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲John de Verdun31岁，母亲Isabel FitzAdam28岁。他于大约1272年与Eleanor de Furnival在英国英格兰越可爾雪菲爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1295年4月23日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年38岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾阿頓。

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Japanese: written 井伊 ‘well’ and ‘that’, the name one of Japan's great daimyō families, originally based in Tōtōmi (now part of Shizuoka prefecture), later in Kōzuke (now Gunma prefecture) and Ōmi (now Shiga prefecture). Other variants of the name substitute either character with similar sounding characters such as 飯 ‘cooked rice’, 居 ‘residence’, and so forth. It was formerly Romanized as Iyi. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number II (meaning ‘the second’, i.e. ‘the younger’ of the two bearers of the name) is apparently also counted as a surname Ii.

History: Ii Naomasa (1561–1602) was awarded lands in Kōzuke and Ōmi for his service in the civil wars that won the shōgunate (military dictatorship) for Tokugawa Ieyasu. His family built the beautiful castle of Hikone, which still stands. His descendant Ii Naosuke (1815–1860) ruled Japan for two years as Tairō (Great Elder) and played a major part in signing treaties that opened Japan to foreign trade at the end of the Tokugawa Shōgunate. He was assassinated by adherents of the anti-foreign party.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath was born on 11 June 1256, in Norfolk, England, his father, John de Verdun, was 31 and his mother, Isabel FitzAdam, was 28. He married Eleanor de Furnival about 1272, in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 April 1295, in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Alton, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath est né le 11 juin 1256, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John de Verdun, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel FitzAdam, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Furnival environ 1272, à Sheffield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1295, à Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Alton, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath am 11. Juni 1256 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Verdun 31 und seine Mutter Isabel FitzAdam 28. Er hat um 1272 in Sheffield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor de Furnival geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. April 1295 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Alton, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath è nato il il 11 giugno 1256 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John de Verdun, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabel FitzAdam, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Furnival circa 1272, nel Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 aprile 1295, nel Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Alton, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeathが1256年6月11日にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父John de Verdunは31歳，母Isabel FitzAdamは28歳であった。約1272年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールドでEleanor de Furnivalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1295年4月23日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリクスウオルスで38歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath(이)가 1256년 6월 11일 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Verdun(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel FitzAdam(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셰필드에서 Eleanor de Furnival(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 4월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브리스워스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 알턴에 묻혔다.

pt.11 June 1256–23 April 1295: 11 de junho de 1256–23 de abril de 1295
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath nasceu em 11 de junho de 1256, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Verdun, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel FitzAdam, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Furnival aproximadamente 1272, em Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1295, em Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath родился 11 июня 1256 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Verdun было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel FitzAdam, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Furnival около 1272 г. в местности шеффиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 апреля 1295 г. в местности бриксворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.11 June 1256–23 April 1295: 11 de junio de 1256–23 de abril de 1295
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Verdun II - Baron of Westmeath nació el 11 de junio de 1256, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Verdun, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel FitzAdam, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Furnival aproximadamente 1272, en Sheffield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de abril de 1295, en Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
